message:
chore(ci): remove dead frankensqlite / asupersync sibling-clone steps

These steps were only needed while Cargo.toml had a
[patch.crates-io] table pointing fsqlite-* at ../frankensqlite and
relied on fsqlite-core's path dep on ../asupersync.  The patch table
was dropped in 0.1.42 — every dependency now resolves from crates.io
out of the box — so the sibling clones have become no-ops that waste
CI minutes, slow down cold runs, and add a GitHub rate-limit surface
for no benefit.

Removed 66 lines total across:
- audit.yml (1 job)
- ci.yml (7 jobs)
- conformance.yml (1 job)
- e2e-full.yml (2 jobs)

release.yml was already cleaned up in the 0.1.42 commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,12 +28,6 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683  # v4.2.2
 
-      - name: Checkout frankensqlite (path dependency)
-        run: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite.git ../frankensqlite
-
-      - name: Checkout asupersync (path dependency of fsqlite-core)
-        run: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git ../asupersync
-
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
         with:
